{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/271222562?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/topsec-bunney/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/topsec-bunney/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/topsec-bunney/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/topsec-bunney/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/topsec-bunney", "id": 271222562, "login": "topsec-bunney", "node_id": "U_kgDOECqHIg", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/topsec-bunney/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/topsec-bunney/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/topsec-bunney/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/topsec-bunney/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/topsec-bunney/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/topsec-bunney", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-41399", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-400", "name": "Uncontrolled Resource Consumption"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-770", "name": "Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling"}], "description": "## Summary

The gateway accepted unbounded concurrent unauthenticated WebSocket upgrades before allocating them to an authenticated session budget.

## Impact

An unauthenticated network attacker could consume socket and worker capacity and disrupt WebSocket availability for legitimate clients.

## Affected Component

`src/gateway/server-http.ts, src/gateway/server/preauth-connection-budget.ts`

## Fixed Versions

- Affected: `<= 2026.3.24`
- Patched: `>= 2026.3.28`
- Latest stable `2026.3.28` contains the fix.

## Fix

Fixed by commit `cb5f7e201f` (`gateway: cap concurrent pre-auth websocket upgrades`).

Discovered by：Topsec AlphaLab (wang dong)", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00318, "percentile": 0.23568}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-f44p-c7w9-7xr7", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-03-31T23:54:00Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-f44p-c7w9-7xr7", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-f44p-c7w9-7xr7"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41399"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-03-31T23:54:00Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-f44p-c7w9-7xr7", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/cb5f7e201f3f86ad70e199ef850e636b4cc457ba", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-f44p-c7w9-7xr7"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-f44p-c7w9-7xr7", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: Gateway WebSocket Denial of Service via unbounded pre-auth upgrades", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-28T18:22:28Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-f44p-c7w9-7xr7", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.3.28", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2026.3.24"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenClaw: Gateway WebSocket Denial of Service via unbounded pre-auth upgrades
